project.file: { "compilerOptions": { "module": "nodenext", "moduleResolution": "nodenext", "types": ["jest", "node"], "resolvePackageJsonExports": true, "esModuleInterop": true, "isolatedModules": true, "declaration": true, "removeComments": true, "emitDecoratorMetadata": true, "experimentalDecorators": true, "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true, "target": "ES2023", "sourceMap": true, "outDir": "./dist", "baseUrl": "./", "incremental": true, "skipLibCheck": true, "strictNullChecks": true, "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true, "noImplicitAny": false, "strictBindCallApply": false, "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": false } }

import js from '@eslint/js' import globals from 'globals' import reactHooks from 'eslint-plugin-react-hooks' import reactRefresh from 'eslint-plugin-react-refresh' import tseslint from 'typescript-eslint' import { defineConfig, globalIgnores } from 'eslint/config'
export default defineConfig([ globalIgnores(['dist']), { files: ['**/*.{ts,tsx}'], extends: [ js.configs.recommended, tseslint.configs.recommended, reactHooks.configs.flat.recommended, reactRefresh.configs.vite, ], languageOptions: { globals: globals.browser, }, }, ])

export const SkeletonCard = () => (
);
